There are weaknesses and advantage plus audience when you do and don't use it should be based on when these weaknesses Impact your results so to make this decision Let's first discuss how this works advantage plus audience is the default targeting option now So any custom audiences look like audiences detailed targeting inputs. They're all considered targeting Suggestions now meta will supposedly look at them and prioritize them maybe But for the most part you're just kind of throwing stuff at the wall and hoping that meta pays attention to it Even gender and age maximum are suggestions So it can go beyond if you said oh just target men it can target women if they can get results there If you say stop at people age 54 It can target people beyond that if it can find results there Additionally the highest age minimum that you can set with the van's plus audience is 25 So essentially you're not really setting any guardrails here It's it's minimum in terms of the types of control that you have with the van's plus audience and what will happen is Metta will prioritize conversion history pixel data prior engagement with your ads So there's gonna be a lot of built-in remarketing that happens as well So what I just described can be an advantage You're giving the algorithm flexibility to find results for you and it's especially helpful for purchases, but it can also be a problem There are very few guardrails to prevent the algorithm from exploiting weaknesses to get you more results That's the key here. The problem isn't that advantage plus audience is getting you fewer results The problem is it's getting you more results that aren't relevant. The algorithm wants to please you Based on the performance goal, which defines what you want Now understand that switching to original audiences doesn't always fix this So if you're optimizing for conversions Detailed targeting look like audiences are automatically expanded even if you're optimizing for link clicks or landing page views Those detailed targeting inputs are expanded There's also no clear evidence that your detailed targeting inputs are respected more when using original audiences

## [03:06 - 06:10]

When those audiences are expanded so there are specific problems that Switching to original audiences could fix so let's say that you're getting optimized actions from people outside of your preferred age limit Maybe you can't serve people beyond a certain age The problem here is that age maximum is a suggestion with advantage plus audience But it's a fixed constraint with original audiences or you're getting optimized actions from people below your preferred age minimum the highest age minimum for advantage plus audiences 25 and no such restriction exists for Original audiences or maybe you want to use retargeting right? Custom audiences are only suggestions for advantage plus audience, but you can actually prevent expansion With original audiences when using custom audiences I wouldn't recommend remarketing in the way we used to do it But I still do use it sometimes and I switch to original audiences when I do or if you're optimizing for anything other than conversions So link clicks landing page views through play engagement, etc And finally if you're optimizing for anything other than conversions, but maybe even beyond link clicks and landing page views as well Now I wouldn't typically recommend optimizing for these types of actions because they tend to get you such low quality results But sometimes you have few options and without guardrails which advantage plus audience really does not provide The algorithm will exploit every possible weakness to get you the action that you want These actions will often be low quality But when switching to original audiences if you're allowed to prevent audience expansion You can use detailed targeting without the audience expanding and set those guardrails So what should you do if you're optimizing for a purchase? I encourage you use advantage plus audience It doesn't guarantee great results The problems that we have highlighted here with advantage plus audience Don't apply when optimizing for a purchase you and the algorithm both want purchases It's not going to exploit weaknesses to get you low quality purchases If you're optimizing for any other type of conversion, it could be a lead. It could be something else. It depends Okay, use advantage plus audience, but watch those results closely Keep an eye on the quality of those results are conversions coming from people you cannot serve due to advantage plus audience issues You can figure this out do a breakdown by gender or by age and see if there's a concentration In groups that you cannot serve and you're getting results there and would switching to original audiences allow you to fix that Otherwise if you're optimizing for anything else as we discussed All these top of the funnel actions Use original audiences in that case even though I wouldn't recommend doing that type of optimization Typically these days, but if you're going to because you have no other choice treat your targeting like it's 2017 Very clearly define your audience with detailed targeting and potentially age and gender
